validations.min: %{field} 欄位至少需要 %{min} 個字元
validations.alpha_dash: The %{field} field may contain alpha-numeric characters as well as dashes and underscores
validations.email: %{field} 欄位必須是有效的電子郵件地址
validations.between: %{field} 欄位必須在 %{min} 和 %{max} 之間
validations.min_value: %{field} 欄位必須為 %{min} 或更多
